query: high protein breakfast i do not have salsa
recipes:
Recipe Name: Healthy, High Fiber, Protein, Low Carb and Calorie Egg Breakfast

Ingredients: 4 egg whites, 1/2 cup salsa, 1/4 cup wheat bran, 1/2 cup fat-free cheddar cheese

Instructions: Combine egg whites with 1/4 cup salsa. Mix well and microwave for 45 seconds., Add wheat bran to egg mixture. Microwave another 30 seconds or until eggs are almost set in the middle., Add remaining salsa and sprinkle cheese liberally on top. Microwave once more, for around 1 minute or until cheese is melted., Enjoy!

Recipe Name: Salsa Vegetable Salad-Dip

Ingredients: 1 (15 ounce) can whole kernel corn, 1 (15 ounce) can white hominy, 1 (15 ounce) can black-eyed peas with jalapenos, 1 (15 ounce) can ranch-style beans with jalapenos, 1 (14 1/2 ounce) can Rotel diced tomatoes, 1 (2 1/4 ounce) can sliced black olives, 2 tablespoons olive oil, 1/4-1/2 cup choppped fresh cilantro, salt, to taste, pepper, to taste, 1/4 cup chopped red onion, garlic powder, to taste

Instructions: Drain all vegetables and combine in a large bowl., Add the seasonings to the oil., Stir into the vegetables., Refrigerate for several hours before serving., Serve as a vegetable dip with crackers or as a vegetable salad.

Recipe Name: Sara's Breakfast Burrito

Ingredients: 2 tablespoons cooking oil or 2 tablespoons butter, 15 ounces diced fresh new potatoes, 8 ounces breakfast sausage links, 1 tablespoon minced mild green chili (canned), 1/2 cup minced onion (sweet, white, or none), 1/2 cup chopped roma tomato (cherry or grape toms are good too), 1/2 cup red peppers or 1/2 cup green pepper, 10 -12 eggs, 6 -8 slices American cheese (or whatever you prefer), 6 (8 inch) flour tortillas, 16 ounces your favorite salsa, for serving on the side (I love Heredez)

Instructions: Put 1tbs of cooking oil/butter in a large frying pan and cook entire (drained can) of potatoes until a nice brown crust forms., Remove Potatoes and put in separate dish., Cook sausage links according to directions on package., Dice cooked sausage links and set aside in separate dish., Add more cooking oil/butter., Add onions, chilis, peppers, tomatoes. Sauté till everything just starts to turn soft., Add sausage and potatoes., Beat eggs together and add to mixture in frying pan., Keep moving everything around so the eggs can seep into all the cracks and crevices and surround all of the ingredients., Heat tortillas between 2 moist paper towels in the microwave for 30 seconds., Immediately place a slice of cheese, ripped in half, on to the tortilla, end to end., Top with filling., "Fold over right side, fold up bottom, then fold over left side. Turn entire burrito over to hold it together. These burritos should be so stuffed that you CANT pick them up to eat them. You must use a fork!", Have salsa on the side or pour all over., ENJOY!, "~The purpose of cooking things separately and putting them in separate dishes, is to able to personalize each burrito if need be. You could also make smaller batches and add beaten eggs only to the ingredients requested. Then you can change the name to (Your Name)s Breakfast Burrito!", ~Other toppings you could add:., Mushrooms., Steak., Crumbled sausage., Any type of cheese., Any type of veggie., Spinach., Sun-dried tomatoes., Roasted red peppers., ETC!

Recipe Name: Skinny Protein Salad

Ingredients: 1 (6 ounce) can tuna in water, drained, 1 cup low fat cottage cheese, 1/4 cup chopped seeded cucumber, 1/4 cup chopped onions or 1/4 cup sliced green onion, 1/4 cup chopped bell pepper, 1/4 cup toasted pine nuts (optional), 1/4 cup chopped olive (optional)

Instructions: Mix everything together., "Chill 1 hour if youre not starving NOW.", Eat.

Recipe Name: Lightened up Breakfast Burrito

Ingredients: 1 onion, chopped, 1 green bell pepper, chopped, 1/2 cup black beans (I used a blend of southwestern style beans), 1/2 cup egg substitute (egg beaters), 1/4 cup fresh cilantro, chopped, 1/3 cup fat free cheese, shredded, 2 whole wheat tortillas, salsa

Instructions: In a skillet sprayed with a lot of Pam (or use a non-stick skillet) combine onion and pepper over medium high heat, cook stirring until soft. I added the leftover salsa from Recipe #341779s - but any other salsa or veggies would be great., Stir in beans and egg beaters (and chipotles or jalapenos if desired). Cook until eggs and veggies are cooked and set., Top with cheese (I used WW cheese)., Place on warmed tortilla, topping with salsa and roll up -- or skip the tortilla and eat as scrambled eggs.

Recipe Name: High Protein and Fiber Breakfast

Ingredients: 1 cup nonfat yogurt (I use Dannon Light n Fit), 1/4 cup skim milk, 1/4 cup oat bran, 1/4 cup wheat germ, 1/2 scoop protein powder (I use vanilla), 1 tablespoon peanut butter

Instructions: combine all ingredients and enjoy!
